evidence.observed: p95=32099 ms, max=45347 ms on practice telemetry

findings.root_cause: The agent is spending too long per request because the prompt/context path is heavy and the free-router model adds retry/rate-limit delay under concurrency.
findings.suggested_fix: Trim the prompt/context load, set self_consistency=1, keep cache on, and pin a faster paid/local model instead of openrouter/free.

evidence.observed: median=30726 tokens, p95=40871 tokens on practice telemetry

findings.root_cause: The request envelope is too large for this task: repeated routing/retries plus a heavy prompt/context keep prompt tokens very high even on simple queries.
findings.suggested_fix: Reduce context_size and self_consistency, avoid unnecessary retries, and use a smaller/cheaper model route for the default path.
